Hero.subtitle: Specializing in business IT solutions. We provide CRM, ERP, security systems, and many other modern services to help your business grow.

FloatingBar.crmDesc: Professionally automate your business processes with latest systems.

About.title: We Create Professional
About.description: TechWay provides comprehensive IT services including CRM, ERP systems, cybersecurity, IP telephony, and network construction. Automate your business processes with the latest modern standards.

RichServices.analyticsDesc: Network security systems and data protection services.
RichServices.advisoryDesc: Organizing modern communication systems and call center services.
RichServices.optimizationDesc: Network development, maintenance, and software license sales.

Services.sectionSubtitle: TechWay provides the most modern IT solutions to take your business to the next level.
Services.crmDesc: Systems for automating business processes, controlling customer relations, and managing resources efficiently.
Services.networkDesc: Designing and installing high-speed local area networks (LAN), Wi-Fi systems, and server infrastructure.
Services.cyberDesc: Ensuring data security, antivirus protection, cyberattack prevention, and network auditing.
Services.ipDesc: Modern communication systems, Call Center software, and virtual PBX integration.
Services.licenseDesc: Official licensing and sales of Microsoft Office, Windows, antivirus, and other specialized software.
Services.crmFeatures: Automated Workflows, Customer Tracking, Inventory Management, Sales Analytics
Services.networkFeatures: High Speed Fiber, Managed WiFi, Server Infrastructure, Network Monitoring
Services.cyberFeatures: Firewall Management, Endpoint Security, Data Encryption, Threat Detection
Services.ipFeatures: Cloud PBX, Call Queueing, CRM Integration, Professional Support
Services.licenseFeatures: Windows & Office, Antivirus Licenses, Specialized Software, Activation Support

Footer.description: TechWay: Dedicated to business IT solutions. CRM, ERP, security systems, IP telephony, call centers, networks, and licensing.
